zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Giffard於1343年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾林頓時，他的父親John de Gifford51歲，母親Catherine Stafford44歲。他與Margaret Whitmore結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾帕廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Giffard于1343年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾林頓时，他的父亲John de Gifford51岁，母亲Catherine Stafford44岁。他与Margaret Whitmore结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾帕廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Giffard was born in 1343, in Chillington, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Gifford, was 51 and his mother, Catherine Stafford, was 44. He married Margaret Whitmore. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Pattingham, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Giffard est né en 1343, à Chillington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Gifford, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Catherine Stafford, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Whitmore. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Pattingham, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Giffard 1343 in Chillington, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Gifford 51 und seine Mutter Catherine Stafford 44. Er hat Margaret Whitmore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pattingham, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Giffard è nato il nel 1343 nel Chillington, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Gifford, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Stafford, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Whitmore. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Giffardが1343年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチリントンで生まれた時，父John de Giffordは51歳，母Catherine Staffordは44歳であった。Margaret Whitmoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアプアッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Giffard(이)가 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 치링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Gifford(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Stafford(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Margaret Whitmore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 패틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Giffard nasceu em 1343, em Chillington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Gifford, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Stafford, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Whitmore. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Giffard родился в 1343 г. в местности чиллингтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Gifford было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Stafford, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Whitmore. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности паттингхам, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Giffard nació en 1343, en Chillington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Gifford, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Catherine Stafford, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Margaret Whitmore. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Pattingham, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
